{
  "mnemonics": [
    "Python is like Cooking: 
    P - Prepare the Recipe (Plan)
    Y - Yield the Desired Result (Understand Output)
    T - Taste and Adjust (Test and Debug)"
  ],
  "keyPoints": [
    "4.2: Loops",
    "4.3: Conditional Statements (if/elif/else)",
    "4.4: Functions",
    "4.5: Modules",
    "4.6: Lists"
  ]
}
